basic_details.job_title: West Singhbhum District Programme Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: West Singhbhum District District Programme Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on the official website chaibasa.nic.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the West Singhbhum District District Programme Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS/MBA in healthcare or master of health/Hospital Administration or Master of Public Health full time regular university degree, At least 2 years experience in implementation of government health insurance programmes or insurance industry of TPA
qualification.details: District Programme Coordinator: MBBS/MBA in healthcare or master of health/Hospital Administration or Master of Public Health full time regular university degree. At least 2 years experience in implementation of government health insurance programmes or insurance industry of TPA.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.chaibasa.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: West Singhbhum District District Programme Coordinator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the West Singhbhum District Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download West Singhbhum District District Programme Coordinator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: West Singhbhum District District Programme Coordinator Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: District Programme Coordinator: MBBS/MBA in healthcare or master of health/Hospital Administration or Master of Public Health full time regular university degree. At least 2 years experience in implementation of government health insurance programmes or insurance industry of TPA.

content_sections.heading: West Singhbhum District District Programme Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.chaibasa.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: West Singhbhum District District Programme Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the West Singhbhum District District Programme Coordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the District Programme Coordinator post is 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the District Programme Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 45 years as of 01 March 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What are the essential qualifications required for the District Programme Coordinator role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS/MBA in healthcare or a master's degree in health/Hospital Administration or Master of Public Health, along with at least 2 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the District Programme Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the District Programme Coordinator position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is offline. Candidates need to send their applications by post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q8. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the District Programme Coordinator post is scheduled for 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Which district is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the West Singhbhum District.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website to download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website: www.chaibasa.nic.in.
